sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85792" key="pornodida/skalos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πορνο-δῐδάσκᾰλος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n85792.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">teacher of fornication,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:1:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
